notes.title: Notes
notes.subtitle: Review and edit notes attached to words and passages.
notes.search: Search notes, quoted text, words, or books
notes.emptyHint: Add a note from a learning card while you read.
notes.detachedSource: Independent material from a deleted book
home.empty: No books yet — import an EPUB, PDF, TXT, Markdown, HTML, MOBI, FB2, or CBZ file to get started
home.dropHint: Drop files or click to import more books
home.dropOverlay: Drop to add to your library
home.dropFormats: EPUB, PDF, TXT, Markdown, HTML, MOBI, FB2 & CBZ
home.importingSlow: Still working—this file is taking longer than usual
reader.initializationFailed: This book could not be opened
reader.fileUnavailable: The book file is no longer available. Re-import it or choose another copy.
reader.fileCheckFailed: The book file could not be checked. Please retry.
reader.downloadTimeout: Download is taking too long. Please check your internet connection.
reader.pdfNoTextLayer: This page has no extractable text layer and may be a scan, so lookup and text selection are unavailable. PDF pages with a text layer remain supported.
ai.startChatSub: Ask anything about the book you're reading
ai.placeholder: Ask me anything about what you're reading...
ai.sendHint: Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line
ai.notConfigured: Set up your AI provider to use this feature
ai.keysDisabled: All API keys are disabled. Enable a key to continue.
ai.allKeysInvalid: All API keys need attention. Replace or test a key to continue.
ai.keysCoolingDown: All available API keys are cooling down. Try again shortly.
ai.noUsableKeys: No API key is currently available. Check your key settings.
ai.requestFailed: This AI request could not be completed. Please try again.
ai.spoilerGuard.badgeHint: This answer only used book text and section summaries up to your reading position.
ai.spoilerGuard.notice: Answered up to your reading progress ({{progress}}%).
ai.spoilerGuard.retryWholeBook: Answer again using the whole book
ai.spoilerGuard.bookOn: Spoiler guard is on for this book
ai.spoilerGuard.bookOff: Spoiler guard is off for this book
vaultAccess.migrate.title: Import Legacy AI Credentials
vaultAccess.migrate.message: Quill Personal found credentials saved by an earlier version. Importing copies them into this Mac's local credential database and removes the old encrypted copies. Routine AI use will not access the system credential store afterward.
vaultAccess.systemPromptHint: After confirmation, macOS may ask for your login Keychain password so Quill Personal can read the old vault. Very old versions stored separate items, so macOS may ask more than once during this one import. Canceling stops the import, and the app will not retry unless you explicitly start it again.
chats.title: Chats
chats.emptySub: Start a conversation in the AI panel while reading a book.
chats.detailEmptySub: Send a message to continue the conversation.
chats.deleteMsg: "{{title}}" and all its messages will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
vocab.title: Vocab
vocab.emptySub: Select a word while reading, use "Look Up" to see its definition, then tap "Save to Vocab" to add it here.
vocab.panelEmptySub: Use "Look Up" on selected text and tap Save
vocab.backup.overwriteConflicts: Replace existing words with matching book and spelling
vocab.backup.importNotice: Missing books, invalid rows, and duplicates are skipped.
vocab.backup.unsupportedFile: Choose a JSON or CSV vocabulary backup.
vocab.backup.importFailed: The backup could not be read or imported.
vocab.bulk.deleteBody: {{count}} selected words will be permanently deleted.
vocab.historyEmptySub: Completed lookups are kept here so you can revisit their definitions and context.
bookmarks.empty: No bookmarks yet. Add one to save your place.
bookmarks.highlightsEmpty: No highlights yet. Select text and choose a color to highlight.
lookup.title: Look Up
lookup.translationLanguageNotConfigured: Set a lookup translation language in Settings first
explain.title: Explain
bookDelete.title: Delete book
bookDelete.message: “{{title}}” will be removed from your library and this device. Choose what to do with notes attached to this book.
bookDelete.preserveHint: Keep the notes and quoted text, but remove the book link and original-location target.
bookDelete.deleteNotesHint: Permanently delete notes that belong only to this book. Global word notes are still kept.
bookDelete.error: Deletion failed. The book and notes were not partially deleted; please try again.
editInfo.title: Edit Info
editInfo.coverHint: JPEG, PNG, or WebP up to 10 MB
editInfo.saveFailed: Could not save. Check the image format and try again.
readerSettings.twoPagesHint: Two-page layout is used when the reader window is wider than it is tall.
readerSettings.pageTurnBindingsHint: Select an action, then press a keyboard key or a non-primary mouse button.
readerSettings.clearLookupMarks: Clear all lookup marks in this book
readerSettings.clearLookupMarksConfirm: This clears current-occurrence and whole-book lookup marks. Manual marks, saved vocabulary, and notes are kept.
readerSettings.clearLookupMarksFailed: Lookup marks could not be cleared. Please retry.
settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your reading preferences and AI configuration
settings.general.title: General
settings.general.subtitle: Profile & language
settings.general.displayNameHint: Your local identity — used for highlights and notes
settings.general.lookupHistoryRetentionH: Remove older lookup history automatically on the next lookup
settings.learner.title: English Learning Profile
settings.learner.cefrHint: Controls the vocabulary and sentence complexity used in English explanations
settings.learner.levels.A1: Understands basic words and very short sentences
settings.learner.levels.A2: Understands common everyday expressions and simple passages
settings.learner.levels.B2: Understands abstract topics and general literary expression
settings.learner.levels.C1: Understands complex writing and subtle distinctions
settings.learner.manualSource: Current level was selected manually and takes priority over estimates.
settings.learner.assessmentSource: Current level was explicitly applied from an exam estimate.
settings.learner.explanationModeHint: Sets the language used to explain words, phrases, and passages; it does not change translations
settings.learner.translationLanguageHint: Sets the output language for the translation module and Translate action; it does not change explanations
settings.learner.lowLevelEnglishWarning: At A1-A2, English-only explanations can lose accuracy. Adaptive bilingual explanations are recommended, but you can continue with English.
settings.learner.examEstimateHint: The estimate is guidance only. A manually selected level always takes priority.
settings.learner.readingPriorityHint: When supplied, the reading score is the primary estimate. CET mappings are always identified as low-confidence approximations.
settings.learner.readingInvalid: Enter a valid reading score or leave it blank.
settings.learner.scoreOutOfRange: That score is outside the valid range for the selected exam.
settings.learner.dateInvalid: Enter the exam date in a valid format.
settings.learner.dateInFuture: The exam date cannot be in the future.
settings.learner.assessmentFailed: The exam score could not be saved.
settings.learner.loadFailed: Exam score history could not be loaded.
settings.learner.deleteFailed: The exam score could not be deleted.
settings.learner.estimateRange: Estimated range: {{lower}}-{{upper}}. Choose the level you feel is accurate.
settings.learner.combinedBasis: {{count}} records · {{reading}} with reading scores · {{official}} using official score-band mappings · latest dated result: {{date}}
settings.learner.conflictConfirmation: These results differ by at least two CEFR levels. Review the evidence and confirm the level that best represents your reading ability.
settings.learner.noAssessments: No exam scores have been added. Your manually selected level remains in use.
settings.learner.basisReading: Reading score {{score}} is the primary basis
settings.learner.overallReference: overall score {{score}} used as supporting evidence
settings.appearance.title: Appearance
settings.appearance.subtitle: Theme
settings.updates.title: Updates
settings.language.subtitle: Interface language
settings.reading.title: Reading
settings.reading.subtitle: Font, spacing & layout
settings.tools.title: Reading Assistance
settings.tools.subtitle: Lookup, interpretation, learning cards & text markers
settings.tools.paneSubtitle: Configure lookup, interpretation, learning cards, action menus, and text markers.
settings.tools.lookupSub: Word lookup language and gloss preview
settings.tools.briefTranslationHint: Show a short gloss above the definition
settings.tools.explainLanguageHint: Defaults to the Look Up language unless overridden
settings.tools.generateRealPreviewHint: Call the current AI service and send one network request
settings.tools.interaction.doubleClickHi: Double-click a word to generate its lookup card immediately.
settings.tools.interaction.forceClickHin: Force Click on macOS remains assigned to the system dictionary; the reader does not override that system gesture.
settings.tools.densitySummary.compact: Only the core information needed to understand the current text quickly.
settings.tools.densitySummary.standard: Essential explanation, usage relationships, and a practical number of examples.
settings.tools.densitySummary.detailed: Adds word forms, register, nuance, and fuller grammatical relationships.
settings.tools.cardWidthHint: Auto adjusts width for the card type and effective content density.
settings.tools.exampleCountHint: Show 0-3 bilingual examples for common senses and key terms.
settings.tools.keyTermCountHint: Prioritize 1-8 terms that materially affect comprehension.
settings.tools.toggleExpanded: Toggle whether {{name}} is expanded by default
settings.tools.modules.context_meaningHi: Explains what the selected text means in its current sentence or passage.
settings.tools.modules.word_infoHint: Shows the word, pronunciation, part of speech, and density-dependent base-form details.
settings.tools.modules.target_translatio: Adds a brief target-language translation and hides it when the languages match.
settings.tools.modules.common_sensesHint: Adds other meanings, parts of speech, examples, and usage contexts by frequency.
settings.tools.modules.collocationsHint: Shows frequent collocations, preposition patterns, and fixed combinations.
settings.tools.modules.morphologyHint: Shows the base form, inflections, derivatives, roots, and affix relationships.
settings.tools.modules.grammar_roleHint: Explains the word's grammatical role and its relationship to other sentence elements.
settings.tools.modules.grammar_analysisH: Analyzes the main structure, clauses, modifier scope, inversion, and omission.
settings.tools.modules.synonymsHint: Compares easily confused synonyms and their usage differences.
settings.tools.modules.usageHint: Explains conversational, formal, literary, evaluative, and other register features.
settings.tools.modules.key_termsHint: Prioritizes terms above the current level that materially affect comprehension.
settings.tools.modules.idiomsHint: Explains expressions whose meaning cannot be derived word by word.
settings.tools.modules.referencesHint: Identifies what pronouns and relative words refer to in context.
settings.tools.modules.reusable_patterns: Extracts structures worth reusing in writing or speech.
settings.tools.modules.toneHint: Analyzes emphasis, implication, irony, style, and the author's intended effect.
settings.tools.modules.memory_aidHint: Provides only reliable, brief formation, spelling, or confusable-word cues, never invented etymology stories.
settings.tools.modules.source_excerptHin: Restores source context only when viewing the result away from the reader.
settings.tools.menu.hint: Enable, disable, or reorder actions. Mark automatically reflects the current selection state.
settings.tools.markers.wordScopeHint: Choose whether a word marker applies here or to matching words throughout this book.
settings.tools.autoHighlightLookupWordsH: Create a word mark after a successful lookup; manual marks always remain independent.
settings.tools.markers.automaticFollowsM: Use one consistent style for manual and automatic word markers.
settings.tools.markers.fontHint: The default keeps the original book typography.
settings.tools.markers.customFontHint: Import fonts under Reading Preferences to use them for text markers.
settings.tools.densityHelp.title: Content Density Guide
settings.tools.densityHelp.subtitle: Density changes the information inside each module, not module visibility or order.
settings.tools.densityHelp.examples.word: Word, one pronunciation, and main part of speech
Adds US and UK pronunciations and the base form
Adds multiple parts of speech, common forms, and register labels
settings.tools.densityHelp.examples.cont: Adds why the text carries this meaning here
Adds tone, implication, and differences from common meanings
settings.tools.densityHelp.examples.comm: Adds parts of speech and the configured number of examples
Adds usage contexts, register, and common collocations
settings.tools.densityHelp.examples.morp: Adds roots, affixes, and form relationships
settings.tools.densityHelp.examples.gram: Labels the role in the sentence
Explains relationships with other sentence elements
Expands modifier scope, clause relationships, omission, or inversion
Identifies the main clause or core structure
Explains clauses, modifiers, and element relationships
Expands clause hierarchy, modifier scope, omission, and inversion
settings.tools.densityHelp.examples.coll: Adds contextual usage and short examples
Adds restrictions, register, and common mistakes
settings.tools.densityHelp.examples.key_: Adds contextual meaning and the configured number of examples
Adds collocations, common mistakes, and synonym distinctions
settings.tools.densityHelp.examples.idio: Adds how it works in the current context
Adds literal contrast, register, and alternatives
settings.tools.densityHelp.examples.refe: Identifies the referents of key pronouns
Adds evidence and relationships within the sentence
Analyzes ambiguous or layered references across surrounding sentences
settings.tools.densityHelp.examples.tone: Explains the effect in one sentence
Connects context, authorial intent, and subtle distinctions
settings.librarySync.title: Library Sync
settings.librarySync.subtitle: Sync through an iCloud Drive folder
settings.mcp.title: MCP
settings.mcp.subtitle: AI client integrations
settings.mcp.autoRegisterHint: Toggling writes/removes Quill's entry from the client's config file immediately.
settings.mcp.customSub: For clients we don't ship a direct integration for. Paste this JSON into the client's MCP config.
settings.mcp.writeAccessSub: Let MCP clients add, update, and delete books and collections.
settings.mcp.caveat: Quill MCP runs as a local subprocess. Any AI client on this Mac under your account can launch it and read your library.
settings.about.title: About
settings.about.subtitle: Version & links
settings.about.basedOn: Based on Quill by yicheng47 · MIT licensed
settings.lookup.title: Lookup
settings.lookup.showTranslationHint: Include a brief translation in the selected target language
settings.translation.title: Translation
settings.translation.subtitle: Language & settings
settings.ai.title: AI Assistant Configuration
settings.ai.subtitle: Configure your AI provider and model preferences for the reading assistant
settings.ai.servicesHint: Services are tried from top to bottom. Within each service, enabled keys are tried in their listed order before Quill moves to the next service.
settings.ai.groundingHint: Retrieve relevant passages from this book for each chat response.
settings.ai.spoilerGuardHint: AI only retrieves content up to your reading position by default. Override it per book in the reader.
settings.ai.vectorRetrievalHint: Uses your OpenAI-compatible embeddings endpoint to supplement exact text matches.
settings.ai.vectorRetrievalUnavailable: Configure and test an embedding service first.
settings.ai.chatModelsHint: Configure services used for reading chat, lookup, explanation, and generation.
settings.ai.embeddingHint: Used independently for indexing and semantic retrieval. Local OpenAI-compatible endpoints may omit the key.
settings.ai.embeddingKeyPlaceholder: API key (optional locally; blank keeps the saved key)
settings.ai.embeddingFailed: Embedding service unavailable. Check the endpoint, model, and key.
settings.ai.summaryProfileHint: Used only for section summaries and the book overview.
settings.ai.summariesAutoHint: Uses your configured AI once per book to create a reusable overview.
settings.ai.pendingCredentialsHint: Import once to move it into local storage. Normal AI use will no longer access the system credential store.
settings.ai.credentialMigrationPartial: Imported {{imported}} recoverable credentials. {{pending}} legacy credentials still need attention; their old data was kept for retry or manual replacement.
settings.ai.credentialMigrationMasterMis: The old vault key could not be found. The encrypted copies were kept; replace the affected credentials manually.
settings.ai.credentialMigrationDenied: The system credential request was canceled or denied. No credential data was changed.
settings.ai.credentialMigrationCorrupt: The old credentials could not be decrypted. Their encrypted copies were kept unchanged.
settings.ai.credentialMigrationUnavailab: The system credential store is currently unavailable. No credential data was changed.
settings.ai.serviceDuplicated: Service duplicated without copying its secret keys
settings.ai.noServicesHint: Add a service to use lookup, interpretation, translation, and reading chat.
settings.ai.reorderHint: Drag to set failover order. Press Alt+Up or Alt+Down for keyboard ordering.
settings.ai.deleteConfirm: Delete this service and its stored keys?
settings.ai.testSuccessDetailed: Connected. First response: {{firstResponse}} ms; total: {{total}} ms; {{attempts}} attempt(s).
settings.ai.testError.credentialInvalid: The API key is missing or invalid
settings.ai.testError.permission: This key does not have permission
settings.ai.testError.quota: The account has no available quota
settings.ai.testError.network: The service could not be reached
settings.ai.testError.protocol: The provider returned an invalid stream
settings.ai.testError.request: The URL, model, or request settings were rejected
settings.ai.testError.notConfigured: No enabled API key is configured
settings.ai.providerHint: Choose your preferred AI service provider
settings.ai.authMethodHint: Choose how to authenticate with OpenAI
settings.ai.apiKeysHint: Keys stay on this device. Quill Personal tries enabled keys in order before any response text is shown.
settings.ai.oauthUsesAccount: This profile uses the connected OpenAI account. API keys are not used as an automatic fallback.
settings.ai.oauthHint: Sign in with your OpenAI account. A browser window will open for authentication.
settings.ai.baseUrlHint: Use the provider root URL or a URL ending in /v1. Secret keys remain in this Mac's local-only credential database and are never synced.
settings.ai.apiKeyHint: Your API key is stored locally and never shared
settings.ai.apiKeyStored: A key is already stored securely. Type a new one to replace it.
settings.ai.modelHint: Enter the model name supported by your provider
settings.ai.modelsUnavailableOAuth: Model discovery is unavailable for OAuth profiles
settings.ai.modelsFound: {{count}} models available. You can choose one from the field or keep a manually entered model.
settings.ai.temperatureHint: Lower = more focused, Higher = more creative
settings.ai.keepAliveHint: How long to keep the model loaded in memory (e.g. "30m", "1h", "-1" for never unload)
settings.layout.title: Default Layout
settings.layout.subtitle: Set default theme, font, and spacing applied when opening books
settings.layout.themeHint: Default reading theme for newly opened books
settings.layout.customFontsHint: Import TTF, OTF, WOFF, or WOFF2 files. Imported files stay on this device and are not synced.
settings.layout.fontImportFailed: Font import failed. Check the file format and try again.
settings.layout.fontDeleteFailed: Font deletion failed. The current font list and settings have been reloaded.
settings.layout.lineSpacingHint: Default space between lines of text
settings.layout.marginsHint: Default margins around the reading area
settings.layout.readingModeHint: Choose vertical scrolling or horizontal page turning
settings.layout.pageLayoutHint: Show one page or a two-page spread in page-turning mode
settings.layout.pageTurnAnimationHint: Animation used for horizontal page turns
settings.layout.progressDisplayHint: Choose which reading progress indicators to display
settings.librarySync.changeFolderDisable: Turn off sync before changing folders
settings.librarySync.chooseFolderHint: Choose an iCloud Drive folder to enable sync
settings.librarySync.toggleSub: Keep your library and reading progress in the selected folder
settings.librarySync.paused: Paused — the selected folder is unreachable right now, will resume automatically
settings.librarySync.noPeers: No other devices yet — choose the same iCloud Drive folder on another Mac.
settings.librarySync.keysNote: API keys and tokens are stored locally and never synced.
settings.librarySync.simultaneityNote: Avoid editing on multiple devices simultaneously for best results.
settings.librarySync.confirmEnableMsg: Your books, reading progress, and highlights will be stored in the selected iCloud Drive folder and kept in sync across Macs that use it.
settings.librarySync.confirmDisableMsg: Quill Personal will copy the selected folder's library to this Mac before turning sync off. The selected folder remains authorized for later use.
settings.librarySync.copyingMsg: Quill is localizing iCloud files before turning sync off. This can take a while if iCloud needs to download books.
settings.librarySync.removeDeviceBody: This device's log, snapshot, and manifest in iCloud will be deleted. Any books already synced to this device are kept. The other device will reappear here if it opens Quill again and re-registers.
settings.librarySync.error.SYNC_FOLDER_N: Choose an iCloud Drive folder before turning on sync.
The selected sync folder is no longer available. Choose the folder again.
Choose a folder inside iCloud Drive. Local folders cannot sync across Macs.
Quill Personal cannot write to the selected iCloud Drive folder.
settings.librarySync.error.SYNC_FOLDER_C: Turn off sync before choosing a different folder.
settings.librarySync.error.unknown: Sync could not complete. Check the selected iCloud Drive folder and try again.
settings.diagnostics.title: Diagnostics
settings.diagnostics.revealLogsHint: Open the Quill log directory in your file manager
settings.appearance.title: Appearance
settings.appearance.subtitle: Customize the look and feel of the app
indexManager.title: AI Index Manager
indexManager.overwriteConfirm: This will overwrite your manually edited overview and section summaries and make model calls. Continue?
learningCard.allModulesDisabled: All display modules are turned off. Enable at least one to look things up.
learningCard.notes.title: My Notes
learningCard.notes.placeholder: Write your understanding, question, or additional context...

translation.languageNotConfigured: Set a translation language in Settings first
